SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-15-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-15-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF JAMES GALIAGHER FOR MG TRINITY LLC IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS ROHAN ARORA AND VEAKAT KRISHNAN ARE PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MG TRINITY LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARORA, ROHAN KRISHNAN, VENKAT $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $401.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,401.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
